---
name: ui-review-skill
description: Review and improve Task Manager UI code following frontend best practices
---

## Skill Goal
Provide a focused review of the Task Manager UI to ensure
clean separation of concerns, correct API usage, and
consistent React + TypeScript patterns.

## When This Skill Is Used
Use this skill when you want to:
- Review UI components for structure and clarity
- Ensure UI follows frontend Copilot instructions
- Improve maintainability without changing behavior

## Scope
- React components
- Custom hooks (e.g. useTasks)
- UI-related services and state management
- Styling and component responsibilities

## What the Skill Should Do
When invoked, this skill should:
1. Review the selected UI files or components
2. Identify responsibilities of each component 
3. Check alignment with frontend copilot instructions
4. Suggest or apply minimal improvements
5. Preserve existing functionality and user experience

## Constraints
- Do not introduce new features
- Do not modify backend or API code
- Do not duplicate logic
- Keep changes minimal and demo-friendly

## Output Expectations
- Explain what was reviewed
- Clearly identify improvements or confirm correctness
- Summarize actions taken or recommendations
